prompt: Write a UE5.7 C++ AttributeSet (header + cpp) with a single replicated Health attribute, including the accessor macros, GetLifetimeReplicatedProps, and the OnRep handler. Output only code.
Write a UE5.7 PlayerState that owns an AbilitySystemComponent using Mixed replication mode and implements IAbilitySystemInterface. Output only code.
In UE5.7 C++, apply an instant GameplayEffect (a TSubclassOf<UGameplayEffect>) to an AbilitySystemComponent's own actor at level 1. Output only the function body.
In UE5.7, where do you call InitAbilityActorInfo when the ASC lives on the PlayerState? Show the Character's PossessedBy and OnRep_PlayerState overrides. Output only code.
Write the module .cpp for a secondary UE5.7 game module named EchoesCore. Output only code.
In a UE5.7 Actor constructor, create a StaticMeshComponent and attach it to the root component. Output only code.
Write a UE5.7 Build.cs for a module that uses the Gameplay Ability System. Output only code.
In UE5.7 C++, generate a deterministic random integer between 6 and 10 from a seed so the same seed always gives the same result. Output only code.
